views.name: NowReadingView
views.purpose: Primary view showing currently-reading books as cards with visual progress bars (circular or linear). Each card shows cover color placeholder, title, author, page progress (e.g. 142/380), and a percentage ring. Tapping a card opens BookDetailView. A quick-update stepper on each card lets users bump currentPage without leaving the view. If no books are being read, shows an inviting empty state prompting to add one. Also shows today's reading streak badge and daily page goal progress at the top.

views.name: LibraryView
views.purpose: All books organized into horizontal shelf rows grouped by status: Currently Reading, Want to Read, Finished, Abandoned. Each shelf scrolls horizontally showing book spines/cards. A search bar at top filters across all shelves. Tapping any book opens BookDetailView. Finished books show star rating below the card. Long-press allows quick status change. Count badges on each shelf header.

views.name: StatsView
views.purpose: Reading statistics dashboard. Top section: yearly goal ring (e.g. 8/24 books) with motivational label. Middle section: key metrics in a grid — total books finished this year, total pages read, average rating, reading streak days. Bottom section: genre breakdown as a horizontal bar chart showing distribution of books read by genre. Monthly books-finished bar chart showing reading pace over the year.

views.name: BookDetailView
views.purpose: Full detail view for a single book, pushed as a sheet or navigation destination. Shows large genre-colored header with title and author. Progress section with page stepper and visual bar. Notes section as a scrollable text editor for quotes, thoughts, chapter notes — the core note-taking area the user requested. Status picker to change reading status. Rating stars (visible when status is finished). Start/finish date display. Edit and delete actions.

views.name: BookEntrySheet
views.purpose: Modal sheet for adding a new book. Title and author text fields at top. Total pages stepper. Genre picker as a scrollable chip row with icons. Status defaults to 'Want to Read' with option to set 'Reading' immediately. If 'Reading' is selected, startedReading auto-fills to today. Optional notes field. Clean, focused form — get the book into the library fast.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentlyReading
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries with status == .reading, sorted by lastReadDate descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: wantToReadBooks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries with status == .wantToRead, sorted by date added

viewModelComputedProperties.name: finishedBooks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries with status == .finished, sorted by finishedReading descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: booksFinishedThisYear
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of finished books where finishedReading falls in current calendar year

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalPagesReadThisYear
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of totalPages for all books finished this year, plus currentPage for books currently reading

viewModelComputedProperties.name: readingStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count consecutive days backwards from today where at least one book has lastReadDate on that day

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean rating of all finished books that have a rating > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: genreBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of finished books per genre, sorted by count descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyFinished
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 12 integers representing books finished in each month of the current year

viewModelComputedProperties.name: progressPercent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Returns currentPage / totalPages as percentage for a given book entry, clamped 0-100

dailyGoal.description: Target number of pages to read per day

yearlyGoal.description: Target number of books to finish per year

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if at least one book's lastReadDate matches that calendar day. Streak counts consecutive qualifying days backwards from today. Missing a day resets the streak to 0.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Monthly books-finished rate compared to pace needed for yearly goal. If user has finished 8 books by June, pace = 8/6 = 1.33/month vs needed 24/12 = 2/month → 'Behind pace' indicator. Also track pages-per-day rolling 7-day average.
insights: On-track / behind-pace indicator for yearly reading goal with projected finish count
Average time to finish a book (mean days between startedReading and finishedReading)
Most-read genre with percentage of total library
Current reading velocity: rolling 7-day pages-per-day average
Longest reading streak achieved (all-time best vs current)
Books abandoned rate as percentage of total started books
